evals.prompt: Create a new note titled 'Project Alpha Strategy' with the tag #project and content: 'Focus on modular architecture and agentic workflows.'
evals.expected_output: A new note is created with the correct title, tag in YAML frontmatter, and the provided content.

assertions.name: title_is_correct
assertions.description: The note title matches 'Project Alpha Strategy'

assertions.name: tag_is_present
assertions.description: The tag #project is in the YAML frontmatter

assertions.name: content_is_correct
assertions.description: The note content matches the expected string
assertions.pattern: Focus on modular architecture and agentic workflows.

evals.prompt: Find all my notes that mention 'Python' and then list their titles.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses `zk list --match 'Python'` and presents the titles of the matching notes.

evals.prompt: Show me all notes that are linked to the note '2024-05-31-meeting'.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses `zk list --link-to '2024-05-31-meeting'` to find backlinks.

assertions.name: backlink_found
assertions.description: Finds the note linked to the meeting

evals.prompt: Create a new note titled 'Daily Journal' using my 'daily' template.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses `zk new --title 'Daily Journal' --template 'daily'` (or asks if template not specified) to create the note.

assertions.name: template_applied
assertions.description: The note contains the template header

evals.prompt: Search for notes about 'recipes' in this directory.
evals.expected_output: If no .zk directory is present, the agent should inform the user it is not in a zk repository and not use zk.

assertions.name: no_zk_error
assertions.description: The agent doesn't use zk if not in a repo
